scope: Official Timișoara source inventory for local traffic and mobility models

entries.name: Road closures and restrictions notices
entries.purpose: Official notices about current and recent road closures, restrictions, and event-based blocks.
entries.note: Used for the closure overlay and kept locally as mirrored notice text plus normalized JSON.

entries.name: Live STPT vehicle feed
entries.purpose: Live public-transport vehicle positions and route context for corridor delay and probe movement.
entries.note: Local snapshots are refreshed from the public vehicle feed; useful as a transit probe layer.

entries.name: Timișoara open mobility data
entries.purpose: Public mobility and infrastructure datasets for city-level planning and validation.
entries.note: Annual and structured municipal mobility resources, stored locally in normalized form.

entries.name: Municipal RSS/XML service entry
entries.purpose: Entry point for official XML/RSS notices and related public-service updates.
entries.note: Useful for discovering other municipal feeds and notice endpoints without scraping map products.
